channel.title: presentation on Ziniu Li
channel.description: Recent content in presentation on Ziniu Li

item.title: Presentation
item.description: Talks [2021-04-22] Zeroth order methods using adaptive smoothing parameters. The first doctoral and postdoctoral forum of Shenzhen Research Institute of Big Data. (Best Paper Oral Presentation Award) [2020-10-24] Efficient exploration by novelty pursuit. DAI 2020, online. [slides] Paper Reading My paper reading presentation at the following seminars: RL Group at CUHKSZ, Deep Learning Group at CUHKSZ and Prof. Tom Luo's Group Meeting. [2021-04-15] Margin maximum and implicit bias.
